summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently with no shared canonical. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening action is planned because the job disables instant close, low-signal closeout, merge, and fix PRs. One security-sensitive hydrated linked PR is routed to central security handling; unrelated open PRs and linked issues are kept open or escalated only for specific maintainer decisions.
